EmailTemplate.name: NDA is Signed
EmailTemplate.subject: The Latest version of the NDA has been signed
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Legal Team,
The NDA {!NDA__c.Name} has been fully signed and uploaded in Salesforce.
Please review the document before moving the NDA to the completed stage.
Here is the link to the record: {!NDA__c.Link_To_NDA__c}.
Best regards,
